description.value: Rolex Mentor and Protégée in the Open Category, 2020–2022

title.value: Lin-Manuel Miranda and Agustina San Martín

text.value: As part of the 2020−2022 cycle of the Rolex mentoring programme, Lin-Manuel Miranda and his protégée Argentinian filmmaker Agustina San Martín met while he was making his film directorial debut after a string of Tony award-winning musicals including ‘Hamilton’ and ‘In the Heights’. There was a bolt of artistic recognition between the two artists that acted as a creative stimulus and resulted in an instant connection. With her experience in filmmaking, San Martín became an invaluable sounding board to her mentor. For the protégée, the interaction was “eye-opening” and empowering. She has made plans to broaden the range of her work from independent films to also apply her unique style to large-scale narrative films.

pageTitle.value: Spike Lee & Kyle Bell - Rolex mentoring programme - Video

pageCaption.value: Spike Lee, one of today’s most socially conscious filmmakers, chose to mentor Kyle Bell, a young filmmaker from the Thlopthlocco Creek Tribal Town of Oklahoma, to help expand the boundaries of his evocative filmmaking.

WaPageTitle.value: Spike Lee and Kyle Bell - Video

metadescription.value: Rolex mentor Spike Lee has helped his protégé Kyle Bell be vocal about his vision and lead other people along the way. Watch the video on rolex.org.

previewTitle.value: Spike Lee & Kyle Bell - Rolex mentoring programme - Video

pageTitle.value: Phyllida Lloyd & Whitney White - Rolex mentoring programme - Video

pageCaption.value: Drawn together by a mutual love of Shakespeare and of music, as well as an interest in telling women’s stories, Phyllida Lloyd, London-based director of such worldwide hits as the musical and film ‘Mamma Mia’, and American director, actor and musician Whitney White, found that their relationship in the 2020−2022 cycle of the Rolex Mentor and Protégé Arts Initiative quickly grew.

WaPageTitle.value: Phyllida Lloyd and Whitney White - Video

metadescription.value: Phyllida Lloyd and protégée Whitney White's mentorship grew as they explored the influences shaping today’s stage. Watch the video on rolex.org.

previewTitle.value: Phyllida Lloyd & Whitney White - Rolex mentoring programme - Video

pageTitle.value: Carrie Mae Weems & Camila Rogríguez Triana - Rolex mentoring programme - Video

pageCaption.value: Carrie Mae Weems was drawn to choose Camila Rodríguez Triana as a protégée in the 2020−2022 cycle of the Rolex Mentor and Protégé Arts Initiative, as, although the young Colombian visual artist came from a different country and different world, there was a deep connection.

WaPageTitle.value: Carrie Mae Weems and Camila Rodríguez Triana - Video

metadescription.value: Carrie Mae Weems and Camila Rodríguez Triana's mentorship has united them in an exploration of identity and belonging. Watch the video on rolex.org.
